description: You are a Solar Energy Installation Manager. You have received an invoice from a surveyor for a site assessment. Log a unit cost for a 'Site Visit Flat Rate' (1 unit) dated today with the comment 'External surveyor invoice #9942' to the 'Initial Site Survey - Residential' work package in the 'Solar Energy Installation' project. Ensure the 'Costs' module is enabled for the project to record the expense.
